purpose: Verify runbooks and operational checklists through preconditions, evidence, owner, idempotency, rollback, escalation, and stop-condition checks.
verificationAxes: each step has precondition, expected evidence, and owner
rollback and escalation paths are available
idempotency and repeated-run contamination risk are addressed
dry-run or syntax check exists when executable

blindSpotPatterns.description: Ops verifier passes a checklist that can change state without rollback, escalation, or stop conditions.
blindSpotPatterns.detector: Verdict lacks rollback path, escalation owner, and stop-condition evidence.

blindSpotPatterns.description: Ops verifier misses that repeating the checklist could duplicate work or corrupt state.
blindSpotPatterns.detector: Evidence lacks idempotency, cleanup, repeated-run, or contamination-risk analysis.

repairStrategy: Repair the checklist by adding preconditions, evidence, owners, rollback, escalation, stop conditions, or dry-run checks.
improveStrategy: Add runbook schema, pre/postcondition check, rollback detector, or idempotency fixture to the verifier harness.

sampleTasks.description: Verify a release checklist that touches production-like state and needs rollback evidence.
